leg: mask-fix ACCEPTANCE + A4 attenuation (efficacy of dcd9ac2 at the decisive seq256 point)
authorized: 2026-07-11 by Jordan ('launch it with the A4 attenuation arm')
fix_under_test: axolotl feature/expert-store @ dcd9ac2 — un-routed rows filled with the zero-decode byte (nf4 0x77 / fp4 0x00 / float 0x00) -> dequantize to EXACTLY 0.0 (proven per-expert on real bnb). Default staging=routed behaviour.
host: RunPod SECURE PRO 6000 Blackwell WS (sm_120); build gates driver>=580, memlock waived (false gate); torchvision pin; prediction_loss_only.
body: Qwen3-30B-A3B, seq 256, sample_packing, seed 42, 150 steps, eval_steps 50 — the decisive-leg body (its routed-legacy gap was 0.186 = 186x floor at rf 0.688).

arms.whole_c: ga4 — the ga4 floor (spread of 3 finals)
arms.routed_legacy: ga4, AXOLOTL_EXPERT_OFFLOAD_ROUTED_FILL=real — POSITIVE CONTROL (must reproduce the bug) + A4 baseline gap4
arms.whole_ga8: ga8 (single arm) — the ga8 whole reference

efficacy_criterion.floor: spread(max-min) of whole_a/b/c ga4 finals (prior 4 brackets all 0.0010)
efficacy_criterion.STRONG_PASS: gap_mask <= 1x floor (indistinguishable from same-config noise -> fix fully closes it)
efficacy_criterion.PASS: gap_mask <= 5x floor (>=97% collapse from the 186x bug; residual within a small multiple of noise)
efficacy_criterion.VOID_UNLESS: routed_legacy (ga4) reproduces gap >= 100x floor -> the harness still exhibits the bug the fix targets; else the run is void (bug not reproduced, efficacy unmeasurable)

A4_attenuation.incoherent_noise_prediction: ratio ~ sqrt(4/8) = 0.71 (averaging 8 vs 4 microbatch gradients attenuates independent per-row perturbations)
A4_attenuation.readout: ATTENUATES if ratio <= 0.85 (supports quadrature/independent-noise, the k~0.47 signature); DOES-NOT-ATTENUATE if ratio >= 0.85 (supports coherent/compounding, corroborating the seq512 CONVEXITY which already argued against pure sqrt). ONE comparison of two noisy gaps -> directional evidence, not a hard verdict.
A4_attenuation.confound_note: ga8 sees 2x tokens/step over the same 150 steps -> different trajectory, but the GAP at each ga controls for that (both ga8 arms share the trajectory); gap8-vs-gap4 is the clean averaging comparison.

cost_budget: 8 arms, ~$13, ~5h on the PRO 6000. ABORT any arm >90 min wall.
scope: Establishes fix EFFICACY (does routed_mask collapse the 186x gap) + the A4 mechanism readout. Correctness of the mask (un-routed -> exact 0.0) is already proven on real bnb (commit dcd9ac2); this is the training-convergence claim the unit tests explicitly do NOT make.
